title: Badewannenfilter
categories_flat: Küche, Haushalt & Wohnen > Garten > Pools, Gartensaunas & Badewannen mit Sprudelfunktion > Filter, Pumpen & Zubehör > Filter

top_reviews.body: This filter is so good and Easy to put on👀🤌

date.raw: Bewertet in den USA am15. März 2026

top_reviews.body: after moving to the desert, my entire family skin started breaking out and was constantly dry due to the dry air and climate. My daughter started having eczema patches on her legs and after switching to this purifier, it cleared up we’ve already purchased a second one.

date.raw: Bewertet in den USA am15. April 2026

top_reviews.body: Bought this mainly because I have sensitive skin, and it’s been a game changer. The water feels cleaner, and I’ve noticed less itching and dryness after baths. It also seems to reduce that strong chlorine smell. Great value for the price.

date.raw: Bewertet in den USA am8. April 2026

top_reviews.body: I'M PISSED I bought this new thing to see if it's protecting you from harmful chemicals & it read over 200 which means your just blowing your money on something that's not protecting your family!Never will I buy this ever again!WOW

date.raw: Bewertet in den USA am14. April 2026

top_reviews.body: I waited to use the filter before I reviewed it.  I have terrible well water it's discolored & has a odor. I used the filter and the water was not discolored however it did not filter the debris that sometimes comes out. Overall it's okI bought the shower filter also I suggest that over the bath filter.

date.raw: Bewertet in den USA am5. April 2026
